name: intervals-icu-mcp
description: intervals.icu: analyze training history and plan/schedule workouts.

prompts.name: plan_race
prompts.description: Analyze fitness and generate the first periodized training block toward a goal race.
prompts.text: Build a periodized training plan for a ${arguments.sport} ${arguments.distance} on ${arguments.race_date}. ${arguments.notes}

prompts.name: next_block
prompts.description: Generate the next training block, adapted to what was actually completed and current form.
prompts.text: Continue the race plan with the next 3-4 week block, adapted to what actually happened. ${arguments.notes}

prompts.name: analyze_form
prompts.description: Concise weekly form check-in (fitness/fatigue/form/recovery). Read-only, no calendar writes.
prompts.text: Give a concise weekly form check-in (fitness, fatigue, form, recovery). ${arguments.notes}

prompts.name: analyze_trainings
prompts.description: Analyze completed training(s) and give actionable feedback. range: session | week | month. Read-only.
prompts.text: Analyze the athlete's training over the ${arguments.range} and give actionable feedback. ${arguments.notes}

prompts.name: todays_workout
prompts.description: What should I do today? Explains today's planned session (or suggests one), factoring in form and weather. Read-only.
prompts.text: Tell me what to do today, factoring in form and weather. ${arguments.notes}

prompts.name: log_today
prompts.description: Log today's wellness from a plain-language note. Writes via log_wellness.
prompts.text: Log today's wellness from this note: ${arguments.notes}
